prose.en: Employ the following techniques to hide or conceal {param:sc-30.05_odp.02}: {param:sc-30.05_odp.01}.

guidance.en: By hiding, disguising, or concealing critical system components, organizations may be able to decrease the probability that adversaries target and successfully compromise those assets. Potential means to hide, disguise, or conceal system components include the configuration of routers or the use of encryption or virtualization techniques.

prose.en: {param:sc-30.05_odp.01} are employed to hide or conceal {param:sc-30.05_odp.02}.

objects.en: procedures addressing concealment and misdirection techniques for the system
system configuration settings and associated documentation
list of techniques employed to hide or conceal system components
list of system components to be hidden or concealed
organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
organizational personnel with the responsibility to conceal system components
Mechanisms supporting and/or implementing techniques for the concealment of system components

guidelines.en: techniques to be employed to hide or conceal system components are defined;
system components to be hidden or concealed using techniques (defined in SC-30(05)_ODP[01]) are defined;
